action.reasoning: Observation: Best 21.18%, stuck. Analysis: Fine-tuning may overfit to source domain textures. CLIP zero-shot uses text embeddings which are domain-agnostic. Decision: Try CLIP zero-shot + ensemble with fine-tuned model. Also try linear probe (frozen backbone).
